findings.title: STATUS.md stale — In-flight section references 2026-05-30 push as pending (already merged) and understates sprint delay
findings.detail: STATUS.md §In flight showed 'audit/nightly-2026-05-30 — push pending for this session' — that branch was merged (commit 3b46e72). The 2026-06-02 nightly audit (f7ce2a2) also did not update STATUS.md. SPRINT-2026-05-B was described as '9 days overdue' but as of 2026-06-09 it is 20 days overdue.
findings.fix_sketch: Moved 2026-05-30 and 2026-06-02 audit entries to Done section. Updated In-flight to current 2026-06-09 nightly audit. Updated SPRINT-B overdue count to 20 days.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md Q3 open question stale — 'as of 2026-05-30 (10 days elapsed)' understates urgency by 10 days
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Q3 open question said 'as of 2026-05-30 (10 days elapsed)' but today is 2026-06-09 — 20 days since SPRINT-2026-05-A ended on 2026-05-20. The stale date understated urgency of the unresolved Esme R1 Retell confirmation.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced 'as of 2026-05-30 (10 days elapsed)' with 'as of 2026-06-09 (20 days elapsed)'.

findings.title: RISKS.md R-013 mitigation references M-026 which does not exist in ROADMAP.md
findings.detail: RISKS.md R-013 mitigation read 'Pre-call screening questionnaire (planned M-026)' but ROADMAP.md only defines milestones up to M-024. M-025 and M-026 are not registered. Workers following the mitigation cannot find the referenced milestone.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced 'planned M-026' with 'future milestone (not yet scheduled in ROADMAP.md)' to eliminate the dangling reference.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md frontmatter last_updated 2026-05-21 does not match footer Last verified 2026-05-30
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md frontmatter said last_updated: 2026-05-21 but the footer said 'Last verified: 2026-05-30 — nightly audit'. The frontmatter was not updated when the Q3 deadline notice was added.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated ROADMAP.md frontmatter last_updated from 2026-05-21 to 2026-05-30.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §5 table says 'regen from frontmatter' for DECISIONS.md but generator is not wired
findings.detail: AGENTS.md §5 Commands table said the tool for updating DECISIONS.md index is 'regen from frontmatter' — but DECISIONS.md frontmatter states the generator is 'not yet wired — manually maintained until M-002+ ships'. The table entry implied automation that does not exist.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced 'regen from frontmatter' with 'Manual update to index table (automation pending M-002)' in AGENTS.md §5 table.
